Feature Selection
Chicken Saltimbocca
Prosciutto · Sage · White Wine Butter · 26
The Story

Chicken breast layered with prosciutto and sage, pan-seared until the prosciutto crisps and the chicken stays tender. Deglazed with white wine, finished with butter, and plated over a bed of sautéed spinach.

A Roman classic — saltimbocca means "jumps in the mouth." Bright sage, salty prosciutto, and a silky pan sauce that pulls the whole plate together. Effortless and elegant.

Prosciutto
Fresh Sage
White Wine Butter
Sautéed Spinach
The Name · Roma
Saltimbocca translates to "jumps in the mouth" — Roman shorthand for a dish so bright and savory it grabs you on the first bite.
